name: Phoenix Gold Resources Corp.
summary: Phoenix Gold Resources Corp., a mineral exploration and development company, acquires and explores for gold properties in the United States. The company holds interests in the Plumas property, which consists of 2 patented lode mining claims with extra lateral rights covering an area of 40 acres, as well as 1 patented mill site claim consisting of 8.5 acres; and the Eldorado property comprising 1 patented lode mining claim covering an area of 20 acres located in Battle Mountain, Lander County, Nevada. Phoenix Gold Resources Corp. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
